Adjust the opacity if needed to better s: Rekebisha uwazi ikiwa inahitajika ili kuona vyema tabaka zilizo chini.
Are you sure you want to start over and: Una uhakika unataka kuanza tena na kuchora tena mchoro wako?
Calculations are queued and should start: Mahesabu yamepangwa kwenye foleni na yanapaswa kuanza kwa muda mfupi.
Calculations will start once overlay lay: Mahesabu yataanza mara tu tabaka za juu zitakaposhughulikiwa.
Downsampled cells are displayed, roughly: Seli zilizopunguzwa sampuli huonyeshwa, takriban sawa na gridi ya mraba <2> </2>. Vuta karibu ili kuona seli zenye ubora kamili.
Finish using the measurement tool before: Maliza kutumia zana ya kipimo kabla ya kuendelea kuchora.
Full resolution cells are being shown, r: Seli zenye ubora kamili zinaonyeshwa, takriban sawa na gridi ya mraba <2> </2>.
Name: Jina
Processing your sketch. This should only: Usindikaji wa mchoro wako. Hii inapaswa kuchukua muda tu.
Results are calculated when a sketch is: Matokeo huhesabiwa wakati mchoro unapoundwa au kusasishwa. Poligoni zinaweza kugawanywa ili kuhesabu vivuko vya antimeridiani au kuingiliana na michoro mingine katika mkusanyiko.
SeaSketch creates optimized layers for f: SeaSketch huunda tabaka zilizoboreshwa kwa ajili ya usindikaji wa haraka. Hizi zinahitaji kuzalishwa mara moja tu, au wakati wowote safu chanzo inaposasishwa.
Select cells where this property is: Chagua seli ambapo sifa hii iko
Select one or more options to limit cell: Chagua chaguo moja au zaidi ili kupunguza seli kwa zile zenye thamani zinazolingana. Ikiwa hakuna uteuzi uliofanywa, kichujio hiki hakitatumika.
SignInToSketch: Tafadhali <2>ingia</2> au <6>unda akaunti</6> ili kuanza kuunda michoro.
There was a problem calculating metrics: Kulikuwa na tatizo la kuhesabu vipimo vya kadi hii.
These metrics are calculated in order to: Vipimo hivi huhesabiwa ili kutoa takwimu muhimu kama vile asilimia ya ufunikaji. Kama vile tabaka zilizoboreshwa, huhesabiwa upya tu ikiwa safu chanzo imesasishwa.

Kundi hili lina thamani za ingizo.
Bonyeza ili kupanua.
Use the sliders above to filter between: Tumia vitelezi vilivyo hapo juu kuchuja kati ya safu ya thamani kwenye histogramu, au weka thamani halisi katika ingizo zilizo hapa chini.
You must fix problems with your geometry: Lazima urekebishe matatizo na jiometri yako kwanza
